Bash(/c/Users/dudu/software/miniconda/envs/agent/Scripts/python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/knowledge.db'\); conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row; r = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM pages'\).fetchone\(\); print\(f'Pages: {r[\\"c\\"]}'\); r = conn.execute\('SELECT title, COUNT\(*\) as c FROM pages GROUP BY title HAVING c > 1'\).fetchall\(\); [print\(f\\"  DUPE: {x['title']} \({x['c']}x\)\\"\) for x in r]; r = conn.execute\('SELECT * FROM file_records'\).fetchall\(\); print\(f'Files: {len\(r\)}'\); [print\(f'  {x[\\"file_name\\"]}'\) for x in r]; conn.close\(\)")
